description:
Log in to Moodle as admin (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!).

1. Navigate to Site administration > Users > Accounts > Cohorts.
2. Add a new cohort named 'Fall 2026 Nursing Cohort' with Context 'System' and Cohort ID 'NURS-F26'.
3. Assign exactly these 5 users to the cohort: Jane Smith (jsmith), Michael Jones (mjones), Alice Wilson (awilson), Bob Brown (bbrown), Carlos Garcia (cgarcia).
4. Go to the course 'Health Assessment' (NURS200).
5. Navigate to its Participants page and open the 'Enrollment methods' settings.
6. Add the 'Cohort sync' method.
7. Select your 'Fall 2026 Nursing Cohort' and change 'Add to group' to 'Create new group', then save.
8. Turn on Edit mode in the course.
9. Upload the file at `~/Documents/Clinical_Guidelines.pdf` to the first topic section as a File resource named 'Required Clinical Skills'.
